PROP-baseauction-inv-001.text: Reentrancy guard must prevent reentrant calls to bid() via callback execution.
PROP-baseauction-inv-001.assertion: forall call bid(asset,amt,data): s_entered==true during execution => nested bid() reverts

PROP-baseauction-inv-002.text: Asset transferred to bidder BEFORE pulling payment; callback must not bypass payment pull.

PROP-baseauction-inv-003.text: Bid amount must not exceed available auction balance for the asset.
PROP-baseauction-inv-003.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount,data): amount <= balanceOf(this,asset) => no revert on transfer

PROP-baseauction-inv-004.text: Price decay multiplier must linearly decrease from start to end over auction duration.

PROP-baseauction-inv-005.text: All rounding in assetOutAmount computation must round UP in favor of the protocol.
PROP-baseauction-inv-005.assertion: forall _getAssetOutAmount: actual_out >= floor_out (mulDivUp and mulWadUp used)

PROP-baseauction-inv-006.text: No new auctions started if assetOut price is invalid (checkUpkeep clears eligible list).

PROP-baseauction-inv-007.text: Bid must revert if auction is not live (auctionStart==0 or duration elapsed).
PROP-baseauction-inv-007.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): auctionStart==0 OR elapsed>duration => revert InvalidAuction

PROP-baseauction-inv-008.text: Elapsed time clamped to auctionDuration in getAssetOutAmount preventing underflow.
PROP-baseauction-inv-008.assertion: elapsedTime = min(elapsedTime, auctionDuration) before multiplier computation

PROP-baseauction-inv-009.text: Cannot start auction for asset already in live auction (performUpkeep reverts).

PROP-baseauction-inv-010.text: AssetOut eligible balance forwarded to receiver instead of starting auction.
PROP-baseauction-inv-010.assertion: forall performUpkeep: asset==s_assetOut => transfer to assetOutReceiver, no auctionStart set

PROP-baseauction-inv-011.text: Auction end handler returns remaining asset to feeAggregator and assetOut to receiver.

PROP-baseauction-pre-001.text: Bid USD value must meet minimum bid threshold to prevent dust bids.

PROP-baseauction-pre-002.text: Callback must not allow bidder to avoid payment pull after receiving auctioned asset.
PROP-baseauction-pre-002.assertion: forall bid with callback: safeTransferFrom(bidder,this,assetOutAmount) must succeed post-callback

PROP-baseauction-asm-001.text: Only feeAggregator balance counted for eligible auction assets, not contract balance.

PROP-baseauction-asm-002.text: Auction ends when duration elapsed OR remaining balance below minAuctionSizeUsd.
PROP-baseauction-asm-002.assertion: checkUpkeep: auctionEnded iff (elapsed>duration OR (priceValid AND bal<minSize))

PROP-baseauction-post-001.text: After bid settles, s_entered must be reset to false.
PROP-baseauction-post-001.assertion: forall bid(): after emit AuctionBidSettled => s_entered == false

PROP-baseauction-inv-017.text: Auction start timestamp must equal block.timestamp at time of performUpkeep execution.

PROP-baseauction-inv-018.text: feeAggregator.transferForSwap must be called before any auction starts in performUpkeep.
PROP-baseauction-inv-018.assertion: forall performUpkeep: transferForSwap(this, eligible) precedes s_auctionStarts[asset]=timestamp

PROP-baseauction-inv-020.text: checkUpkeep/performUpkeep data consistency: decoded performData must match checkUpkeep output.
PROP-baseauction-inv-020.assertion: performUpkeep(checkUpkeep().performData) must process same eligible/ended sets

PROP-baseauction-inv-021.text: Stale performData between checkUpkeep and performUpkeep can start auctions with invalid state.
PROP-baseauction-inv-021.assertion: performUpkeep re-validates auctionStart==0 and balance>=minSize for each eligible asset

PROP-baseauction-inv-023.text: Callback gas consumption must not prevent payment pull from completing.
PROP-baseauction-inv-023.assertion: forall bid with data.length>0: callback gas limited or safeTransferFrom succeeds after

PROP-baseauction-inv-024.text: Bidder receives exact computed assetOutAmount, no extra tokens drained via rounding.

PROP-baseauction-inv-025.text: Auction balance available for bidding must equal actual ERC20 balance of contract.

PROP-baseauction-pre-003.text: Auction eligible asset USD value must meet minAuctionSizeUsd threshold.

PROP-baseauction-inv-028.text: Ended auction cleanup must delete s_auctionStarts entry and call _onAuctionEnd.
PROP-baseauction-inv-028.assertion: forall performUpkeep ended: s_auctionStarts[asset] deleted AND _onAuctionEnd called

PROP-baseauction-inv-029.text: Price multiplier at t=0 equals startingPriceMultiplier, at t=duration equals endingPriceMultiplier.

PROP-baseauction-inv-030.text: Malicious callback reverting must not leave s_entered locked (DoS on future bids).
PROP-baseauction-inv-030.assertion: if callback reverts => entire bid() reverts => s_entered remains false (no state change)

PROP-baseauction-inv-031.text: Auction price at any time t must be monotonically non-increasing as t increases.
PROP-baseauction-inv-031.assertion: forall t1<t2: getAssetOutAmount(t2) <= getAssetOutAmount(t1) for same input amount

PROP-baseauction-pre-004.text: performUpkeep must fetch assetOut price with validation=true before starting auctions.
PROP-baseauction-pre-004.assertion: forall performUpkeep eligible: getAssetPrice(assetOut,true) called before auction starts

PROP-baseauction-inv-032.text: Total assetOut paid by all bidders in an auction must not exceed contract assetOut balance.
PROP-baseauction-inv-032.assertion: sum(assetOutAmount for all bids in auction) <= initial assetOut balance at auction start

PROP-baseauction-inv-033.text: Flash-loan bid pattern: bidder must have assetOut balance to pay after callback returns.
PROP-baseauction-inv-033.assertion: forall bid with callback: ERC20(assetOut).balanceOf(bidder) >= assetOutAmount post-callback

PROP-baseauction-inv-034.text: Multiplier computation must not underflow when startMult equals endMult.
PROP-baseauction-inv-034.assertion: startMult == endMult => priceMultiplier == startMult (no subtraction underflow)

PROP-baseauction-inv-036.text: performUpkeep endedAuctions must revert if asset has no active auction (auctionStart==0).
PROP-baseauction-inv-036.assertion: forall performUpkeep ended[j]: s_auctionStarts[asset]==0 => revert InvalidAuction

PROP-baseauction-inv-037.text: getAssetOutAmount assetOutUsdPrice must be fetched with same validation mode as caller.
PROP-baseauction-inv-037.assertion: getAssetPrice(s_assetOut, withValidation) called with caller's validation flag

PROP-baseauction-inv-038.text: Bid on asset with decimals==0 (removed/unconfigured) must revert.
PROP-baseauction-inv-038.assertion: forall bid(asset): s_assetParams[asset].decimals==0 => revert (no valid auction)

PROP-baseauction-inv-039.text: Division by assetOutUsdPrice in getAssetOutAmount must not divide by zero.

PROP-baseauction-inv-040.text: Precision loss in mulDivUp chain must not enable systematic value extraction across bids.
PROP-baseauction-inv-040.assertion: sum(rounding_error per bid) << total_auction_value (bounded by 2 wei per bid)

PROP-baseauction-inv-041.text: checkUpkeep with no valid prices returns upkeepNeeded=false, preventing stale auction starts.
PROP-baseauction-inv-041.assertion: all prices invalid => eligibleAssets empty AND endedAuctions empty => upkeepNeeded=false

PROP-baseauction-pre-006.text: Bid price calculation uses current asset price (not stale), fetched with validation=true.
PROP-baseauction-pre-006.assertion: forall bid: assetPrice = getAssetPrice(asset, true) => reverts if stale/zero

PROP-baseauction-inv-042.text: safeTransfer to bidder must use exact computed amount, not msg.value or other user input.
PROP-baseauction-inv-042.assertion: forall bid: safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount) where amount == bid input parameter

PROP-baseauction-inv-043.text: s_entered guard must be set to true before any external call in bid() flow.
PROP-baseauction-inv-043.assertion: forall bid: s_entered=true precedes safeTransfer AND callback AND safeTransferFrom

PROP-baseauction-inv-044.text: Auction must not accept bids after duration has elapsed (time-based expiry).
PROP-baseauction-inv-044.assertion: forall bid: block.timestamp - auctionStart > auctionDuration => revert InvalidAuction

PROP-baseauction-inv-045.text: performUpkeep must verify asset params exist (decimals!=0) before starting auction.
PROP-baseauction-inv-045.assertion: forall performUpkeep start: assetParams.decimals==0 => revert AssetParamsNotSet

PROP-baseauction-inv-046.text: performUpkeep eligible/ended arrays from stale checkUpkeep data must be re-validated.
PROP-baseauction-inv-046.assertion: performUpkeep re-checks auctionStart, params, minSize for each eligible asset individually

PROP-baseauction-pre-007.text: Bid assetOutAmount computation must use withValidation=true to reject zero/stale prices.

PROP-baseauction-inv-047.text: Net token flow per bid: contract sends asset to bidder, receives assetOut from bidder.

PROP-baseauction-inv-048.text: checkUpkeep must skip assets with decimals==0 (unconfigured/removed assets).
PROP-baseauction-inv-048.assertion: forall checkUpkeep iter: assetParams.decimals==0 => continue (skip asset)

PROP-baseauction-inv-049.text: Price query in bid() uses getAssetPrice(asset, true) not getAssetPrice(asset, false).
PROP-baseauction-inv-049.assertion: bid() calls getAssetPrice with withValidation=true => stale/zero prices revert

PROP-baseauction-inv-050.text: checkUpkeep getAssetPrice uses withValidation=false; invalid prices handled gracefully.
PROP-baseauction-inv-050.assertion: checkUpkeep: getAssetPrice(asset, false) => no revert, returns isValid flag

PROP-baseauction-inv-051.text: Concurrent bids on same auction must not cause balance underflow via race condition.
PROP-baseauction-inv-051.assertion: forall concurrent bids: amount <= balanceOf(this) checked atomically per tx
